title: Graduate Software Engineer
description: Build and maintain web applications with guidance from senior engineers. This role is designed for fresh graduates who understand programming fundamentals and want structured engineering exposure.
responsibilities: Write clean frontend and backend code under mentor review
Fix bugs, document changes, and participate in sprint ceremonies
Test features before release and learn production debugging
Collaborate with product, QA, and support teams

title: Digital Marketing Trainee
description: Support campaign execution, content planning, and performance reporting for city-level marketing initiatives. A good fit for freshers who enjoy writing, analytics, and fast-moving consumer brands.
responsibilities: Assist with social media calendars and campaign briefs
Track campaign metrics and prepare weekly reports
Coordinate with design and city operations teams
Research competitor campaigns and local trends

title: Junior Finance Analyst
description: Help the finance team prepare reports, reconcile data, and support monthly business reviews. The role is suitable for commerce graduates with strong spreadsheet skills.
responsibilities: Prepare daily transaction and revenue summaries
Reconcile invoices, ledgers, and payment reports
Support month-end closing and documentation
Create simple dashboards for business teams

title: People Operations Associate
description: Support onboarding, employee records, and candidate coordination for a growing SaaS team. This is a beginner-friendly HR role with hands-on process exposure.
responsibilities: Coordinate interviews and candidate communication
Maintain employee records and onboarding checklists
Support engagement activities and internal surveys
Help HR partners with reports and policy documentation

title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Work with a product team to build responsive UI components and learn production frontend practices. Freshers with React projects or strong JavaScript basics are encouraged to apply.
responsibilities: Build reusable UI components from design specs
Improve accessibility and responsive behavior
Write basic tests and fix reported UI issues
Review code with mentors and document learnings

title: Inside Sales Executive
description: Speak with interested learners, understand their goals, and guide them toward the right learning plan. The role is built for confident communicators starting a sales career.
responsibilities: Call verified leads and understand student needs
Explain product benefits clearly and responsibly
Maintain CRM notes and follow-up schedules
Meet weekly activity and conversion targets

title: Operations Coordinator
description: Coordinate daily marketplace operations, resolve partner issues, and track service quality for a city operations team. A strong fit for freshers who like structured execution.
responsibilities: Track daily operational metrics and escalations
Coordinate with restaurant partners and field teams
Prepare simple reports for city managers
Identify process gaps and suggest improvements

title: Content Writer
description: Write clear articles, short-form copy, and interview summaries for startup and career audiences. This role suits freshers with a portfolio of writing samples.
responsibilities: Draft articles, captions, and newsletter snippets
Research founders, companies, and industry topics
Edit copy for clarity, grammar, and brand tone
Coordinate with editors on deadlines and revisions

title: Data Analyst Trainee
description: Support business teams with reports, SQL queries, and dashboard updates. This trainee role is suited for freshers who enjoy numbers and can explain insights simply.
responsibilities: Write SQL queries for daily business reports
Clean data and validate dashboard accuracy
Summarize trends for category and operations teams
Automate recurring reports with templates

title: Accounts Associate
description: Assist with bookkeeping, tax documentation, and client account checks. This role is ideal for commerce freshers who want practical finance operations exposure.
responsibilities: Verify invoices, bills, and supporting documents
Support GST and basic tax filing workflows
Maintain account records with accuracy
Coordinate with clients for missing information

title: Associate Product Analyst
description: Work with product managers to review user journeys, track feature metrics, and document product requirements. A good first role for analytical freshers interested in product.
responsibilities: Track product metrics and summarize user behavior
Document requirements, edge cases, and release notes
Coordinate with design, engineering, and support teams
Run competitor and user feedback analysis

title: Junior UI Designer
description: Create interface screens, design assets, and simple prototypes with guidance from senior designers. Freshers with a strong portfolio and Figma basics can apply.
responsibilities: Prepare UI screens, states, and component variants
Convert feedback into polished design iterations
Maintain design files and handoff notes
Collaborate with product and frontend teams

title: Logistics Support Associate
description: Support shipment tracking, hub coordination, and customer escalations for logistics operations. This role is suitable for freshers who are detail-oriented and calm under pressure.
responsibilities: Track shipments and update internal systems
Coordinate with hubs, vendors, and customer teams
Resolve delivery exceptions within defined timelines
Prepare daily status reports for operations leads

title: Business Development Associate
description: Identify potential customers, explain services, and support the sales team in building a healthy pipeline. This is an entry-level role for freshers who enjoy people-facing work.
responsibilities: Reach out to prospective customers and qualify leads
Explain service options and schedule follow-ups
Update CRM records with accurate notes
Coordinate with senior sales executives on closures

title: Cyber Security Analyst Trainee
description: Learn security monitoring, vulnerability checks, and incident documentation with an experienced security team. Freshers with networking basics and curiosity about security can apply.
responsibilities: Monitor alerts and document suspicious activity
Assist with vulnerability scans and basic triage
Prepare incident notes and escalation summaries
Learn security tooling, policies, and response steps
